description: When a contact is added to the database and has no touchpoints
When an event tag or organizer matches a contact's interests
When contact has no touchpoints in the last 90-180 days
When a court filing is submitted involving principals contact company
When a principal was involved in an opportunity that has not been updated in over 3 weeks.
When recently published firm content matches the interests of an external contact.
When contact has an upcoming meeting with a principal
